title: Nightmare Alley
plot: An ambitious carnival worker skilled in psychological manipulation swindles wealthy elites in 1940s society, allied with a dangerous psychiatrist.

title: Cronos
plot: An elderly antique dealer uncovers a golden mechanical scarab artifact that grants youth and immortality, discovering it requires a hunger for human blood.

title: The Devil's Backbone
plot: An orphan boy arriving at a remote school during the Spanish Civil War is haunted by the spectral image of a student murdered on the grounds.

title: Blade II
plot: The vampire hunter Blade forms a temporary alliance with an elite vampire squad to hunt down a mutated strain of monsters that preys on both humans and vampires.
